nav.title: Taucho
welcome.subtitleline: Bring your live streams to life — automate your smart home with every chat, gift, and reaction.
policy.contactUsText: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, would like to exercise your privacy rights, or have concerns about our privacy practices, please contact us at:
policy.contactDesc: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, would like to exercise your privacy rights, or have concerns about our privacy practices, please contact us at:
policy.contactInfoText: If you have questions about these Terms of Service or need to report a violation, please contact us at:
policy.responseTime: We will respond to your inquiry within 30 days.
policy.introText: Taucho is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and otherwise process your information in connection with our streaming automation platform. Please read this Privacy Policy carefully. By accessing or using Taucho, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by all the terms of this Privacy Policy.
policy.accountDataDesc: When you create a Taucho account, we collect: Email address, Username, Password (encrypted), Profile information (name, profile picture), Preferred language and timezone.
policy.streamingCredsDesc: To monitor your live streams, we collect and securely store OAuth tokens and authentication credentials for YouTube, Twitch, and NicoNico channels. We never store your passwords. We use OAuth authentication to access only the permissions you explicitly grant. You can revoke access at any time through your streaming platform's settings.
policy.deviceDataDesc: To control your smart devices, we collect: Device names and identifiers, Device types and capabilities, Device authentication tokens (encrypted), Device location (if applicable), Network configuration details.
policy.eventDataDesc: We collect data about interactions with your streams: Viewer comments and messages (for condition matching), Super Chat amounts and text, Donation and gift information, Viewer counts and stream duration, Reaction and emotion data.
policy.usageDataDesc: We automatically collect information about your use of Taucho: IP address and browser type, Pages visited and features used, Timestamps of your activity, Clicks and interactions within the platform, Device information (operating system, browser).
policy.communicationDataDesc: If you contact us for support, we collect: Messages and correspondence, Attachments and screenshots, Support ticket information.
policy.dataUsageDesc: We use the information we collect for the following purposes: Service Delivery (to provide and maintain Taucho, monitor streams, control devices), Authentication (to verify identity and prevent fraud), Communication (service updates, inquiries, support), Analytics (analyze user interaction and improve functionality), Security (detect, prevent, and address security incidents), Legal Compliance (comply with applicable laws), Marketing (promotional communications with consent).
policy.noSellData: We Do Not Sell Your Data
policy.noSellDataDesc: Taucho does not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties for their marketing purposes.
policy.thirdPartyDesc: We may share your information with trusted third-party service providers including: Cloud infrastructure providers (hosting and storage), Payment processors (billing), Analytics providers (service improvement), Smart home device manufacturers (device control), Streaming platform APIs. These providers are contractually obligated to use information only as necessary and are subject to confidentiality obligations.
policy.legalDesc: We may disclose your information when required by law or in good faith when necessary to: Comply with legal obligations or government requests, Enforce Terms of Service and other agreements, Protect the security or integrity of our Service, Protect the rights, privacy, safety, or property of users or the public.
policy.businessTransferDesc: In the event of merger, acquisition, bankruptcy, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred. We will provide notice before your information becomes subject to a different privacy policy.
policy.securityDesc: We implement industry-standard security measures including: Encryption of sensitive data in transit (TLS/SSL) and at rest, Secure password hashing using bcrypt, Regular security audits and penetration testing, Access controls and authentication requirements, Secure credential storage for streaming and device tokens, Firewalls and intrusion detection systems. However, no method of transmission is 100% secure. While we strive to protect information, we cannot guarantee absolute security. You use our Service at your own risk.
policy.retentionDesc: We retain your information as long as necessary to provide the Service. Account Information is retained while your account is active, plus 30 days after deletion. Stream Event Data is retained for 90 days. Usage Analytics is retained for 12 months. Support Communications are retained for 2 years. You can request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.
policy.accessRightDesc: You have the right to access, download, and receive a copy of your personal information in a structured, commonly used format.
policy.correctionRightDesc: You have the right to correct inaccurate information and to request deletion of your data (subject to legal obligations).
policy.optOutRightDesc: You can opt out of promotional communications at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link or adjusting your preferences in your account settings.
policy.gdprRightDesc: If you are a resident of the European Union, you have additional rights under GDPR, including the right to object to processing, restrict processing, and withdraw consent.
policy.ccpaRightDesc: If you are a California resident, you have rights under CCPA to request disclosure, deletion, and opt-out of the sale of personal information.
policy.cookiesDesc: Taucho uses cookies to enhance your experience: Session Cookies (maintain login), Preference Cookies (remember language and settings), Analytics Cookies (understand usage). You can control cookie preferences through your browser. Disabling cookies may limit functionality.
policy.thirdPartyLinksDesc: Our Service may contain links to third-party websites. This Privacy Policy applies only to Taucho. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of external sites. Please review their privacy policies before providing information.
policy.childrenDesc: Taucho is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we discover a child under 13 has provided information, we will promptly delete it. If you believe a child has provided information, please contact us immediately.
policy.internationalTransferDesc: Your information may be transferred to, stored in, and processed in countries other than your country of residence. These countries may have different data protection laws. By using Taucho, you consent to the transfer of your information to countries outside your country of residence.
policy.policyChangesDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices, technology, or legal requirements. We will notify you of material changes by updating the date and, when appropriate, by sending an email. Your continued use of Taucho following posting of revised Privacy Policy means you accept and agree to the changes.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceText: By accessing and using Taucho, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use our Service. Taucho reserves the right to modify these terms at any time, and your continued use constitutes acceptance of any changes.
terms.serviceDescText: Taucho is a cloud-based streaming automation platform that monitors your live streaming channels across multiple platforms (YouTube, Twitch, NicoNico) and automatically triggers actions on connected smart devices based on stream events such as comments, donations, reactions, and audience engagement.
terms.ageRequirementText: You must be at least 13 years of age to use Taucho. By registering, you represent and warrant that you are at least 13 years old and have the legal authority to enter into this agreement.
terms.accountInfoText: You are responsible for: Providing accurate, current, and complete account information, Maintaining the confidentiality of your password and account credentials, Notifying us immediately of unauthorized access or use, All activities that occur under your account.
terms.terminationText: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your account at any time, for any reason, without notice, including for violation of these Terms of Service.
terms.thirdPartyPermissionsText: To use Taucho, you must authorize the Service to access your streaming platform accounts through OAuth. You grant us permission to: Access your channel information and stream status, Monitor chat messages and viewer interactions, Retrieve stream metrics and analytics, Detect live stream events and interactions.
terms.platformComplianceText: You are solely responsible for complying with the Terms of Service of all streaming platforms you use (YouTube, Twitch, NicoNico, etc.). We are not liable for any violations of third-party platform terms or policies.
terms.revokeAccessText: You may revoke Taucho's access to your streaming accounts at any time through your platform's settings. Upon revocation, we will cease monitoring and cease access to your channel data.
terms.deviceOwnershipText: You represent and warrant that you own or have authorization to control all smart devices you register with Taucho. You are solely responsible for ensuring that the use of these devices complies with all applicable laws and regulations.
terms.deviceControlText: By registering a smart device, you authorize Taucho to send commands to that device based on the conditions and triggers you configure. You acknowledge that we are not responsible for device malfunctions or unintended actions.
terms.safetyResponsibilityText: You are solely responsible for ensuring that automated device triggers do not create safety hazards. This includes ensuring that: Devices do not interfere with essential services or safety systems, Automated actions do not endanger you or others, Device configurations are appropriate for your environment, You have tested and verified device behavior before going live.
terms.deviceTermsText: You must comply with the terms and conditions of all smart device manufacturers and platforms you integrate. We assume no responsibility for device compatibility, performance, or adherence to manufacturer specifications.
terms.prohibitedActivitiesText: You agree not to use Taucho to: Violate any applicable laws, regulations, or third-party rights, Spam, harass, abuse, or threaten other users, Impersonate or misrepresent yourself or others, Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems, Use automated scripts to scrape or extract data (except as authorized), Transmit malware, viruses, or malicious code, Create or distribute phishing content or fraudulent schemes, Circumvent security measures or access restrictions, Interfere with the functionality or performance of the Service, Use the Service for illegal activities, Reverse engineer or decompile our Service, Manipulate stream data or automate fake engagement.
terms.contentMonitoringText: We automatically monitor stream chat messages and viewer interactions to identify trigger conditions. By using our Service, you acknowledge that your streaming content and audience interactions will be processed by our systems.
terms.userResponsibilityText: You are solely responsible for the content you create and share through your streams. We do not monitor or control user-generated content or viewer interactions. You must comply with all applicable laws and platform policies regarding your streaming content.
terms.contentRestrictionsText: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate service for streams or conditions that involve: Hate speech, discrimination, or targeted harassment, Sexual exploitation or child safety violations, Violence or dangerous activities, Copyright or intellectual property violations, Fraudulent or deceptive practices.
terms.ourContentText: All content on Taucho, including software, documentation, graphics, design, and logos, is owned by or licensed to Taucho and protected by copyright and intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or transmit this content without our express written permission.
terms.userContentLicenseText: By using Taucho, you grant us a worldwide, royalty-free, non-exclusive license to use, reproduce, modify, and display any data or configurations you input, solely for the purpose of providing and improving the Service.
terms.thirdPartyContentText: Taucho may contain links to or integrate with third-party services. Intellectual property rights for those services are owned by their respective owners. We claim no rights to third-party content.
terms.limitationLiabilityText: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, TAUCHO AND ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR: Indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages, Loss of revenue, profits, data, or business opportunities, Damage to property or equipment, Service interruptions or system failures, Unauthorized access or data breaches (except caused by gross negligence), Actions taken by smart devices or unintended device behavior, Issues with third-party streaming platforms or services. This limitation applies even if Taucho has been advised of the possibility of such damages.
terms.disclaimerText: TAUCHO IS PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" BASIS WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. SPECIFICALLY, WE DISCLAIM: Any warranty of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose, Any warranty that the Service will be error-free, uninterrupted, or secure, Any warranty regarding the reliability, accuracy, or completeness of data, Any warranty that devices will function as expected or perform intended actions. Your use of Taucho is at your sole risk.
terms.indemnificationText: You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless Taucho, its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising from or related to: Your use of the Service, Your violation of these Terms of Service, Your violation of any applicable laws or rights of third parties, Smart device configurations and automated actions you create, Your streaming content and audience interactions.
terms.modificationsText: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue Taucho or any portion thereof at any time, with or without notice. We are not liable for any harm or damage resulting from such modifications or discontinuation.
terms.downtimeText: While we strive for 99.5% uptime, we do not guarantee continuous service availability. We may perform maintenance that may cause temporary service interruptions. We will provide advance notice of scheduled maintenance when possible.
terms.reliabilityText: We do not guarantee that: Streams will be detected at all times, All viewer interactions will be captured, Device commands will always execute successfully, The Service will meet your specific needs.
terms.subscriptionTermsText: Taucho may offer paid subscriptions with automatic renewal. By subscribing, you authorize us to charge the subscription fee to your payment method on a recurring basis until you cancel.
terms.billingDisputesText: You must notify us of any billing disputes or unauthorized charges within 60 days. We will investigate disputed charges in accordance with applicable law.
terms.cancellationText: You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. No refunds will be issued for partial months.
terms.informalResolutionText: Before initiating any legal action, you agree to attempt to resolve any dispute by contacting us and describing the issue in detail.
terms.arbitrationText: Any dispute, claim, or controversy arising from or relating to these Terms of Service or Taucho shall be settled by binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association, rather than in court. The arbitration shall be conducted in English and held in a mutually agreed location.
terms.classActionText: You agree that any arbitration shall be conducted on an individual basis and not as a class action, collective action, or representative action.
terms.governingLawText: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, USA, without regard to its conflict of law principles. Any legal action or proceeding relating to these terms shall be brought exclusively in the state and federal courts located in California, and you consent to the personal jurisdiction of such courts.
terms.severabilityText: If any provision of these Terms of Service is found to be invalid, illegal, or unenforceable, that provision shall be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it enforceable, or if such modification is not possible, the provision shall be severed. The remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
terms.entireAgreementText: These Terms of Service, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Taucho regarding your use of the Service and supersede all prior or contemporaneous agreements, communications, and proposals. If there is any conflict between these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy, these Terms of Service shall prevail.
terms.contactText: If you have questions about these Terms of Service or need to report a violation, please contact us at:
terms.changesText: We may update these Terms of Service at any time. We will notify you of material changes by updating the date at the top of this page. Your continued use of Taucho after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the modified terms. If you do not agree to the changes, you must stop using the Service and cancel your account.
